name: Textarea
visual_summary: A text area component used for multi-line text input, typically in forms or text editing applications. A developer would use this component for collecting user input that requires more than one line of text, such as comments, reviews, or descriptions. It provides a customizable text area with styles for a dark or light mode, as well as support for focusing and error conditions.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready input component with the following characteristics:

Name: Textarea
Description: A text area component used for multi-line text input, typically in forms or text editing applications. A developer would use this component for collecting user input that requires more than one line of text, such as comments, reviews, or descriptions. It provides a customizable text area with styles for a dark or light mode, as well as support for focusing and error conditions.
Style: dark mode, light mode
Interactions: focusable, error state
Tags: textarea, multi-line, text input, form input

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
